attributes.title: Open Discover for field sidebar
attributes.visState:
{"title":"Open Discover for field sidebar","type":"markdown","params":{"fontSize":12,"openLinksInNewTab":false,"markdown":"## Use Discover for filters (Logz.io-style left panel)

[**Open Logs / Signal**](/app/data-explorer/discover/#/?_g=(filters:!(),refreshInterval:(pause:!f,value:30000),time:(from:now-15m,to:now))&_a=(discover:(columns:!(name,serviceName,observedTimestamp,severityText,event_class,event_category,method,path,status,duration_ms,has_trace,body),interval:auto,sort:!(!(observedTimestamp,desc))),metadata:(indexPattern:shared-observability-logs,view:discover))&_q=(filters:!(),query:(language:lucene,query:'log.attributes.event_class%3Aapplication'))) — default triage.
[**Open Logs / HTTP**](/app/data-explorer/discover/#/?_g=(filters:!(),refreshInterval:(pause:!f,value:30000),time:(from:now-15m,to:now))&_a=(discover:(columns:!(name,serviceName,observedTimestamp,severityText,event_class,event_category,method,path,status,duration_ms,has_trace,body),interval:auto,sort:!(!(observedTimestamp,desc))),metadata:(indexPattern:shared-observability-logs,view:discover))&_q=(filters:!(),query:(language:lucene,query:'log.attributes.event_class%3Aapplication%20AND%20log.attributes.event_category%3Ahttp'))) — access logs (`Request completed` / method · path · status · duration).

### Filter order
1. **namespace** (`loadlinker` / `sesame-idam` / `rerp`)
2. **application** (`serviceName`)
3. **time** (picker, top right)
4. **event_category** (`http` / `auth`) or method / path / status

### Saved searches (Discover → Open)
- **Logs / Signal** — all application logs (`event_class:application`)
- **Logs / HTTP** — access logs only (`event_category:http`)
- **Logs / Errors** — WARN+ within signal
- **Logs / Auth** — `sesame-idam` signal
- **Logs / BFF** — `loadlinker` + `bff` signal
- **Logs / Runtime noise** — rare lifecycle/config lines (`event_class:runtime_noise`)

Epoll and memory stats are **dropped at the collector** (not indexed). Expand a row for structured fields (`log.attributes.message`, method, path, status, duration_ms)."},"aggs":[]}

attributes.visState: {"title":"Top paths (HTTP) \u2014 RPS + p95 vs 500ms SLO","type":"vega","params":{"spec":"{\"$schema\":\"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega/v5.json\",\"padding\":8,\"autosize\":{\"type\":\"fit\",\"contains\":\"padding\"},\"signals\":[{\"name\":\"windowSeconds\",\"value\":900},{\"name\":\"sloMs\",\"value\":500}],\"data\":[{\"name\":\"paths\",\"url\":{\"%context%\":true,\"%timefield%\":\"observedTimestamp\",\"index\":\"otel-v1-apm-logs*\",\"body\":{\"size\":0,\"aggs\":{\"paths\":{\"terms\":{\"field\":\"log.attributes.path.keyword\",\"size\":10,\"order\":{\"_count\":\"desc\"}},\"aggs\":{\"p95\":{\"percentiles\":{\"field\":\"log.attributes.duration_ms\",\"percents\":[95]}}}}}}},\"format\":{\"property\":\"aggregations.paths.buckets\"},\"transform\":[{\"type\":\"formula\",\"as\":\"p95\",\"expr\":\"datum.p95.values['95.0']\"},{\"type\":\"formula\",\"as\":\"vsSlo\",\"expr\":\"datum.p95 <= sloMs ? 'ok' : attributes.title: Logs
attributes.description: Companion overview with HTTP triage (top paths, status table + pie, avg latency). Open Discover for the field sidebar and saved searches (Signal / HTTP / Errors / Auth / BFF / Runtime noise). Epoll and memory are dropped at the collector; rare lifecycle/config noise is selectable via Runtime noise. Managed by shared-gitops-k8s-cluster
